t.t-if: o.partner_id.street_type_show or o.partner_id.street or o.partner_id.street_num or o.partner_id.street2

div.span: - The volume measurements are referred to the agriculturalseason
- Totals are calculated using the four decimal places of the variable, so the sum of the data displayed may differ.
- In the legend you can see the limit percentages configured for each category.

div.name: aggregated_indicators
div.t:
Analysis
Indicator Real Value Mean Value Deviation (%)
Annual Irrigation (m³/)
%
Annual Production (kg/)
%
Irrigation Water Performance (kg/m³)
%
Energy Consumption per Area Unit (kWh/)
%
Incomes (€/)
%
Profitability (€/) (*)
%
(*) Exploitation costs: €/

div.name: subparcels_location
div.span: Below you can find a summary with the main characteristics and the aerial image of each of the monitored subparcels.

div.style: width: 48%; float: left; display: table; border: 1px solid black; margin: 1.5% 0.5%; page-break-inside: avoid;
